jwt-signer-builder.title: JWT signer builder
jwt-signer-builder.description: Build and sign JWT tokens using HS256.
jwt-signer-builder.warningDescription: Use test secrets only. Do not paste production secrets in browser tools.
jwt-signer-builder.cardInputDescription: Provide header, payload, and secret to sign a JWT with HS256.
jwt-signer-builder.invalidHeader: Header must be a valid JSON object
jwt-signer-builder.invalidPayload: Payload must be a valid JSON object
jwt-signer-builder.cardOutputDescription: Copy the generated JWT and individual Base64URL segments.
